CVT_H45_M4R_FK0_v2.0

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 7E1
Recv ID: 7E9
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 6E
Func Name: BVA

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "9",
    "supplier": "APY",
    "soft": "006B",
    "version": "0900"
  }
]
